title: The Greedy Algorithm Decision Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step decision-making process of a greedy algorithm, showing how it builds a solution by always selecting the locally optimal choice.
elements: Feasibility Check (Is choice part of a valid solution?)
relationships: Sorted list is iterated for candidate selection
Selected candidate is checked for feasibility
Feasible candidate is added to the solution set
Process repeats until no more candidates or solution is complete
